title: Mysterious Chips
body:
# **Mysterious Chips 🍟**

### **📖 What is this mod?**  
Mysterious Chips is a mod that started as a fun learning project but unexpectedly gained a fanbase! It adds unique **chips (crisps)** to Minecraft, each with different effects. From the standard **speed buff** to **infinite hearts**, this mod is perfect both for fun and serious gameplay, helping in tough dungeons and battles.  

### **✅ Key Features:**  
- **Variety of chips with unique effects** 🍪  
- **Balanced between fun and usefulness**  
- **Compatible with all major Forge versions (1.12.2 – 1.20.6)**  
- **Easy installation — just drop it into the mods folder**  

# 📷 Check out the gallery for a list of effects.

# ![Mysterious Chips Review](https://github.com/Bogdan3000/Mysterious-Chips/blob/screenshots/review.png?raw=true)

### **🔧 Settings and Customization:**  
- Currently, **no settings** are available, but in the future, there will be an option to fine-tune effects.  
- The mod's **source code** is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/Bogdan3000/Mysterious-Chips), so you can **port it, modify it, and add your own flavors**.  

### **🚀 Future Plans:**  
- Support for newer Forge versions  
- Porting to **Fabric and Quilt**  
- Optimization of **3D models and new textures**  
- Adding **new chip flavors**  
- Adding **localizations** (besides Russian and English)  

### **📥 Installation:**  
1. Download the mod file  
2. Place it in the `mods` folder  
3. Launch Minecraft with Forge and enjoy!
